name: 1StopVAT
description: 1StopVAT — VAT registration, reporting and compliance for digital services, SaaS and e-commerce

seo.title: 1StopVAT — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: 1StopVAT: 1StopVAT — VAT registration, reporting and compliance for digital services, SaaS and e-commerce

when_to_use: VAT registration for SaaS selling digital services in EU
OSS filing for e-commerce with cross-border EU sales
Automating VAT returns for marketplace sellers in 27 EU countries
Handling digital services VAT compliance under MOSS/OSS rules

pros: VAT registration across EU and 40+ non-EU jurisdictions
Handles OSS and IOSS filings end-to-end
Dedicated account manager for compliance queries
Covers digital services, SaaS and e-commerce use cases
cons: Limited public API for deep product integration
Pricing opaque — quotes only after sales call
Smaller than Avalara/Sovos, fewer ERP connectors
Reporting dashboard lags behind modern SaaS UX
review.verdict: Solid managed VAT service for cross-border SaaS, but devs wanting a programmatic API should look elsewhere.
review.best_for: SaaS and e-commerce sellers needing managed EU VAT + OSS/IOSS without in-house tax staff.
review.not_for: Engineering teams that need a first-class REST API and self-serve onboarding.

lock_in.reason: Compliance data portable but historical filings stay with provider

transparency.reason: Subscription pricing available, some tiers opaque
